name: Peach Tomato Salsa
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons seeded and minced jalapeno pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least one hour to allow flavors to meld.
3. After chilling, remove from the refrigerator and let it come to room temperature before serving.
Note: Use caution when handling fresh chilies. Avoid touching your eyes or face, and wash hands thoroughly after use.
